arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim tells Marcus Rashford what he must do to stay at Manchester United
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has admitted Manchester United need a player like Marcus Rashford but says the forward “has to change” and meet his standards to have a future with the club.

arts.ttl: “I have nothing against Marcus Rashford” – Ruben Amorim leaves door open for Man United winger
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has made it clear that if Marcus Rashford wants to play for Manchester United again, he needs to prove he’s hungry for it and raise his standards. The last time Rashford featured for United was in their 2-1 win over Viktoria Plzen early last month.
